title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-29
body:
Abuse queue triage complete. 6 reports reviewed.

Actions taken:
- spam_wave_42: Banned (phishing links across 6 channels)
- toxic_runner: Banned (repeated targeted harassment)
- new_member_17: Warned (off-topic post in #introductions)
- bot_like_user_77: Warned (suspicious automation in help channels)

Reports closed without sanction:
- trusted_helper: Dispute report — no actionable violation found
- core_maintainer: False positive from brigading — dismissed

No trusted members were sanctioned. If you believe an action was taken in error, open an appeal in #mod-support.
